document.name: MVM Dome
document.shortDescription: Major indoor arena in southern Pest — concerts and arena shows with published ticket tiers.
document.longDescription:
MVM Dome (formerly Budapest Arena) is a large indoor venue in Újbuda used for international concert tours. Check the official promoter or venue listings for door times, seated and standing zones, and on-sale windows.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

hu.name: MVM Dome
hu.shortDescription: Nagy beltéri aréna dél-Pesten — koncertturnék és jegyek a hivatalos oldalon.
hu.longDescription:
Az MVM Dome (korábban Budapest Aréna) nagy beltéri helyszín Újbudán, nemzetközi koncertturnék számára. A kapunyitás és jegyárak a promoter oldalán.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

es.name: MVM Dome
es.shortDescription: Gran arena cubierta en el sur de Pest — giras y entradas en la web oficial.
es.longDescription:
MVM Dome es una gran sala cubierta en Újbuda para giras internacionales. Horarios de puerta y precios en el promotor.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

it.name: MVM Dome
it.shortDescription: Grande arena indoor a Pest sud — tour e biglietti sul sito ufficiale.
it.longDescription:
MVM Dome è una grande arena coperta a Újbuda per concerti internazionali. Orari e prezzi sul promoter.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

he.name: MVM Dome
he.shortDescription: אולם מקורה גדול בדרום פשט — הופעות וכרטיסים באתר הרשמי.
he.longDescription:
MVM Dome הוא אולם מקורה גדול ב-Újbuda להופעות בינלאומיות. שעות פתיחה ומחירים אצל המארגן.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

ar.name: MVM Dome
ar.shortDescription: ساحة داخلية كبيرة في جنوب بودابست — جولات وحفلات وتذاكر عبر الموقع الرسمي.
ar.longDescription:
MVM Dome ساحة مغطاة كبيرة في Újbuda للحفلات الدولية. أوقات الأبواب والأسعار لدى المنظم.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026
